str.authority: Anti-Money Laundering Compliance Unit (AMLCU) / An Garda Síochána / Revenue Commissioners
str.notes: Suspicious Transaction Reports must be filed as soon as practicable. VASPs registered with CBI are designated persons under the Criminal Justice (Money Laundering and Terrorist Financing) Acts 2010-2021. Filed via An Garda Síochána and Revenue goAML portal.
